text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Teio, please... race me! I want to see how I match up—please, just this
once!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sure, bring it on, Kita! Let me show you just how amazing your idol
really is! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio accepts the challenge. With that in mind, we get straight to
work...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Haaaaah! More... I can still run more! Ten more laps—no, a hundred
more laps!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna find my weapon—one only I can use! Pant, pant... Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her grit is undoubtedly impressive, and she tackles any exercise
head-on. Instead of getting tired, the more she trains, the more she
gets fired up.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... When it comes to incline running... I have to train at least three times harder than the others. I can keep going, I can still run...
choice_data_list: How many laps are you going to run?
How many laps are you going to run?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: As many as it takes. As far as my legs allow—heck, even if they give way. The Teio agreed to run with me. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll win! I want to win! I've been given this big chance, so I want to show off something amazing and make everyone smile!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Actually, there won't be anyone watching this time... But, you know... there is someone I'd like to make smile...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Of course! Trainer, you've done so much for me already!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to you that I'm here now! So even if you're the sole
spectator, I want to make you smile! And to do that, I need to train
more—I need to train harder!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back to when Kitasan Black talked about her dream. She said
she wanted to inspire others through her racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, she's placing her bets on this single race—this first step. If
this upcoming race was a festival, she'd be a firework lighting the
way.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, please! Help me create my weapon, one made just for me!
And make it more powerful than anyone else's!
choice_data_list: Yeah, you got it. Let's get to work!
Yeah, you got it. Let's get to work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us are perfectly in sync. I prepare the toughest training I
can think of, and she puts her all into completing it. After training day
in, day out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The big day finally arrives.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Kita... is sprinting out of the gate?! She usually holds back at
the start. Did her trainer tell her to try front running?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, that is not the case. This is...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (This... is my weapon! Trainer and I made it together! I call it—Outpace the Pace Chasers!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I'll set the pace of the race, and as long as I don't get tuckered out,
it's my win! This race is mine for the taking!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (Pant, pant, pant... I see... the final stretch! If I can hold out just a little longer...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Wait—Teio's closing in! And she's not tired at all?! Which means...
this'll be a speed showdown.)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Is this all you've got?! Then it's time to end this! Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, Kita's falling behind!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It's unfortunate, but her opponent is Teio. And if the race comes down to a final burst of speed, then her chances are slim...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I've still got... fuel in the tank. But I can't run any faster than this... I
can't win, I can't win—I'm gonna lose...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(This is... just like last time. Even though I trained so much... Am I...
going to lose... again?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It feels like time has stopped. No matter how much grit she has, she
still can't win. But at the moment when all hope seems lost, I find
myself standing up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want her to know she can do it—that her grit is the real deal. Driven
by my belief and desire to encourage her, I instinctively shout—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want her to know she can do it—that her grit is the real deal. Driven
by my belief and desire to encourage her, I instinctively shout—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (Trainer! You helped build me up, even though I'm just a nobody...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Am I going to let this end without returning the favor? Am I going to
let all that time... all those memories... go to waste?)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (I... can't let that happen. I won't let that happen. Because if I did...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Then I—I wouldn't be me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You think I'll let you wiiiiin?! Grrraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What the?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What... what is happening?! She's actually surpassing Teio in speed!
And in the final stretch at that!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Th-that was a close one! For a second there, I thought I was actually
going to lose!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but I still pulled through. Nice try, Kita, but I'm not ready to
lose to you yet.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Nnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: W-waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wait... Kita?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Daaang iiiiit! Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black surprises everyone by bursting into tears, but I
understand why. She might normally be a well-mannered
up-and-comer, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a burning blaze inside her—an unrivaled urge for victory. Not
a glittering spark, but a flame a hundred—no, a thousand times more
brilliant.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I—I couldn't make you smile!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But... I can't give up! I don't want to give up! Next time, I swear I'll
win!
choice_data_list: Yeah, that's the spirit—let's keep on training!
Yeah, that's the spirit—let's keep on training!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, of course! I'll keep working hard from now and forever—and
even after that, too! So please be my official trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
First, I'll make you smile, Trainer! Next, the world, and then the
universe! The sky's the limit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm confident that she'll reach great heights in the future with that
kind of unwavering conviction. Perhaps... I misjudged her at first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought that Kita's strength was her grit. But what was that explosive
power she showed off in her race against Teio?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe, just maybe, her most powerful weapon might simply be... her
ability to work hard for the sake of others.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I must say, that race was extraordinary. What an inspiring show of
emotion... And to think that I have her as my underclassman, no less.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you've finally spread your wings, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You've found it—someone worth fighting for. I can't wait to see what
the future has in store for us!
